programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Celebrating small but mighty animal warriors armed with sheaves of scary weapons; admiring nutrias' stink bombs; honey badgers' needlelike choppers; black-tailed gulls' razor-sharp beaks; the killer talons on dive-bombing peregrine falcons.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin gets called out to New York where he rescues a girl hunted by an organization called Red Spider. Lupin does everything he can to help the poor girl suffering from amnesia; he tries hypnosis on her but to no avail, he gets hypnotized instead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Old man Piccolo had taught Lupin the art of thievery 15 years ago. Learning that his widowed wife had all of her belongings impounded by the police, Lupin promises her to get them all back.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew sneak into Peking's Imperial Palace Museum to steal Emperor Shi's jade Mahjong set, but winds up getting chased by a gang.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Look who is flying above New York; it's Superman! All he does is fly around, but the town is in a panic because of his performance. In the meantime, a lot of banks get robbed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin steals a statue called the Stone Child from the Metropolitan Art Museum; he and Fujiko make their getaway in a Cessna, but they crash at the Bermuda Triangle. They encounter a ghost ship at this grave of many ships and planes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Foodie and gourmet aficionado Baron Gourmel says he wants to eat Lupin's brain. He claims he'd offer his own 70-million dollar jewelry collection to anyone who could capture Lupin. Fujiko hears of it and informs Lupin right away.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin III learns that his grandfather Arsène Lupin's secret treasures are buried in his grave. Lupin learns of its location with Fujiko's microfilm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are surrounded, as usual, as they are trying to escape after a jewelry theft. But somebody shoots at Zenigata and hits him dead on. Lupin learns of the even the next morning in the papers, and Fujiko and Goemon get implicated.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of the Duchy of Blanco has a one-of-a-kind gold coin of Hannibal hidden in his chest; well, Lupin and crew are after it. Amidst their scheming, Jigen is challenged to a duel with a man named Stoneman.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin recieves a letter about Marie Antoinette's jeweled crown, and sneaks into the palace of Versailles. A young man called Oscar appears, the sender of the letter.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin was told by Fujiko to steal a pistol of the Wilhem family worth 500 million pounds. Meanwhile, a man named Jim Benkei, a giant of a man who's stirred troubled in London, steals Jigen's favorite Magnum ...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.desc: When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Matlock must overcome his dislike of a caustic radio personality and defend him when he is accused of killing a rival disk jockey.

programme.desc: Convinced that his brother was framed for murder, a psychopath is determined to get even and holds Matlock’s associates hostage.

programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.desc: Sir Freddy Butler collapses during a speech. The PM suggests the death is due to natural causes, however Barnaby is not convinced.

programme.desc: Barnaby begins to think the damning evidence he helped provide to convict a murderess wasn't exactly as watertight as it first looked.

programme.desc: When the body of a young man is found in a WWII hangar full of exhaust fumes, it looks like suicide. But the man was not alone – and he was hit on the head before he died.

programme.desc: Never-before-seen footage of the season.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik holds an open house attended by longtime rival Ryan and "frenemy" Luis; behind the wheel of his Maserati, Luis shows no interest in mending fences with his adversaries; Luis urges a client to vacate an outdated apartment so he can stage it.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan may be in over his head when he seeks to sell his boss' apartment along with his 400-piece art collection; Fredrik scores the biggest single-unit listing of his career; Luis referees a high-stakes negotiation between a buyer and seller.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: While trying to sell a $35 million listing in the Time Warner Center, Fredrik hits a wall when he targets Chinese buyers; Ryan is the proud recipient of a very special delivery; old friends come knocking with a new listing in Harlem.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik invites Ryan to join him in listing a Chelsea penthouse; Ryan courts a Russian businessman with a penchant for luxury; in spite of a disastrous open house; Luis receives an offer on his Harlem townhouse.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik and his husband, Derek, surprise Ryan's fiancée, Emilia, with a provocative request; it's a race to the finish line with Ryan's Russian buyer, Arty; Luis discovers his new listing once belonged to a famous artist.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik's reputation is on the line when his developers threaten to back out; Ryan is reunited with a familiar blonde on his latest project; Luis is in hot pursuit of a top developer, but an assistant with an icy demeanor threatens to freeze him out.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan tries to close the biggest deal of his life, and he plans on sealing it with a kiss; a winter wonderland awaits Fredrik in Sweden; a twist throws Luis for a loop as he sees the finish line for his Brooklyn townhouse.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: In Sweden, dog-sledding and snowball fights are part of Fredrik's pitch as he tries to fetch a record-setting price for a mountaintop home; Fredrik makes a personal pitch that could impact his future; Ryan gives Olivia a shot at the big leagues.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis' search for a missing broker comes to an unexpected end and has a profound effect on him; developers hold Fredrik's feet to the flames; the time has come to sell a penthouse and settle a bet between Ryan and Olivia.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: A re-energized Luis reaches out to old friends in an effort to close a deal that has eluded him in the past; Fredrik faces competition while trying to win a project; fiancée Emilia has news that catches Ryan off guard.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes buyers on a Hudson River cruise to interest them in his new West Side development; Luis and a developer embark on a plan to create a massive unit overlooking Central Park, but one of Ryan's clients may stop them dead in their tracks.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis tries to lure Ryan back to the negotiating table after the two reach a stalemate over the Central Park South unit; Ryan must salvage a deal that falls through after the buyer is arrested; Fredrik will stop at nothing to impress a client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Luis will do anything to solidify his standing as a major player, even if it means teaming up with a rival; Fredrik receives devastating news; Ryan uses out-of-the-box thinking to come up with a way to lure brokers to an out-of-the-way listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: At the Metropolitan Tower, Luis and Ryan run into complications while co-listing; Ryan's fiancée, Emilia, gets in the middle of things; Fredrik lands a heavenly listing with a hellish downside.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan tries the buyers' patience while trying out a new pricing strategy for a downtown duplex; Fredrik promises a buyer something his developer may not be able to deliver; Luis and a new co-lister dig a hole for themselves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A breathtaking motorcycle chase over the hills of San Francisco figures prominently in the IMF's plan to recover three tons of the drug commonly known as speed from Sam Hibbing's illegal drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Conrad guest stars as a professional assassin whom the Impossible Missions Force must prevent from Carrying out his assignment without knowing the identity of his target in "The Killer" segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Sal Mineo guest stars as a ruthless young operator who heads up an international narcotics ring which the IMF attempts to break up on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Christopher Connelly guest stars as a non-cooperative young computer genius who has "dropped out" of society, but is desperately needed by the IMF to complete their assignment on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps returns to his hometown on personal business, only to find his once happy surroundings in a state of panic caused by a mysterious series of deaths of the young townswomen on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: John Colicos guest stars as a rebellious Caribbean government official, who plans to take over his country by having his president assassinated while in the United States to speak before a joint session of Congress

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Special-guest star Jill Haworth portrays a glamorous double agent, who uses her feminine wiles on Paris to set him up for an enemy plot on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps falls in love with a woman that the IMF has been assigned to bring out of an iron curtain country over the seemingly insurmountable obstacles set in their way by the country's secret police in the "Decoy"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Before the IMF can get the prototype of an Iron Curtain country's secret weapon to the United States, part of the weapon falls into the hands of an unscrupulous, greedy nightclub owner, in "The Amateur"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: While rescuing an imprisoned patriot, Barney is critically wounded and must be left behind in order for the IMF to complete their mission in the "Hunted" episode of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video about how people make peanut butter. Lady Aberlin agrees to take care of Daphne. Henrietta Pussycat suggests making a daycare center at the factory, and Corney agrees.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets Natasha, a famous oboeist. She shows pictures of her children and says she expresses her feelings for them through her music. Prince Tuesday is considering getting sick so that his parents will stay home from work.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett invites Mister Rogers outside for some exercises. Bruce Franco carries a collection of balloon scuptures he has made for the party. He gives Mister Rogers a balloon sculpture that looks like the Neighborhood Trolley.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a week of programs about the environment. He shows how things can be reused. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, there's a real-life problem -- too much garbage -- and the neighbors are trying to find a solution.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bandage on his left hand. He pulls back the bandage to show that his hand is still there. Ana scraped her paw but does not want a bandage. Lady Aberlin is able to convince her otherwise.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make adhesive bandages. Prince Tuesday is looking for someone to play with but all of his friends are busy. At the suggestion of King Friday, he pretends that his rag doll has come to life.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of wolves "singing," and wolf expert Kent Weber stops by with two wolves and explains that wolves are shy, not big and bad like in the fairy tales, and how they live together in families.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folksinger Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers with her ukulele and shares songs her father enjoyed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Yo-Yo Ma describes how he misses his family when he is gone and plays Bach's Sarabande on his cello. Sitting at the piano, Yo-Yo's son Nicholas plays the Skater's Waltz as a duet with his father.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men. After hearing the sound effect from the laughing box, Lady Aberlin sees how long neighbors take to laugh. Eric Kloss makes different sounds using a wind synthesizer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays with different-sized cardboard tubes. Lady Aberlin is observing how neighbors react to the laughter box. Dr. Maggie Kimmel tells the story of “Button Broth.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of how people make toothbrushes. Lady Aberlin observes the neighbors' reactions after she can turn herself into a tiger. Princess Zelda arrives in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole. Mr. McFeely shows a toothpaste video. Lady Aberlin wears a tiger suit, so she can be related to Daniel. Daniel declares that they are related by their hearts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the request of a television neighbor, Mister Rogers arrives with a model car and uses wooden blocks to build a roadway for it to travel. Prince Tuesday does not understand why he is not big like Neighbor Aber and King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plants a seed and visits a conservatory. King Friday orders Handyman Negri to sing a song about not being afraid. This makes the neighbors even more anxious about the “big thing” that is to arrive in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers brings in a cat named Jimmy and remembers him as a kitten. He shows pictures of babies that have grown into adults. Everyone gathers at the castle just as the big thing rolls into the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A towering giant of a giant known as Little Oars Jr. carves a path of death and destruction as he fights to save Ace. The monstrous mauler is within arm's reach of his friend when he's intercepted by the seven warlords of the sea!

programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies and murder.

programme.title: Popeye
programme.desc: The legendary, beloved anvil-armed sailor of the seven seas comes magically to life in this delightful musical, starring Robin Williams as Popeye, who meets all challenges with the unshakable philosophy, "I yam what I yam and that's all that I yam."

programme.title: Summer Rental
programme.desc: Comedy sensation John Candy plays the stressed-out air traffic controller whose much-needed family holiday yields one hysterical misadventure after another.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Joy's frumpy sister Jill becomes a knockout, Victoria and Melanie collaborate on a children's book with a tight deadline, and Elka welcomes an earl and his dignitaries.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Joy realizes she's in love with Bob, Victoria tries to keep up with the much younger Barney, and Melanie is visited by her childhood bully.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: While Victoria hopes to get photographed by a paparazzi drone, the mayor dies in Elka's bed, and Joy and Bob's brother Claude rush to stop Bob from marrying Canadian Joy.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: New couple Bob and Joy's investigation of the dead mayor involves an astrologist, a focus group member, and a journalist.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: After receiving their DNA test results, Victoria exploits her Native American heritage, Melanie is attracted to her cousin, and Joy and Elka are shocked that they're related.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Anthony Zerbe guest stars as a right-wing extremist who embarks on a murderous crusade against what he considers laxity in law enforcement and too-lenient judges. After the case against hit-man Joseph Furika is dismissed, he is murdered.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Impressionist John Byner makes his dramatic debut as a shipboard comedian beset by gambling debts. McGarrett and Five-O become involved while investigating the robbery-kidnapping of Vincent Gordon on board a cruise ship.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A well-to-do, stylish, Raffles-type jewel thief steals from Waikiki hotel rooms for the thrill of the chase. As his calling card, he leaves a series of clues that add up to an elegant method of operation.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Danny and a college professor are kidnapped and held as hostages, to be killed unless two members of a radical group are released from jail. McGarrett, backed by the Governor, refuses to comply with the ransom demands of the kidnappers.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A geothermal dynamics genius, plagued by personal financial problems and pressured by a loan shark, plots an extortion scheme that would trigger a man-made volcanic eruption, wiping out the entire city of Hilo.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Postcards from a psychopath taunting McGarrett to remember crime victims of the past precede a series of re-enacted murders. Eddie Josephs puts down the authorities by recreating murders featured in a series of Honolulu magazine articles.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Attorney Perry Mason's attractive client claims she was chased by a hooded man in a car. Now she's wanted for his murder...and hasn't been too honest about her past arrest as a jewel thief. Now Streaming on Paramount+

programme.title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds
programme.desc: La'An tests a prototype holodeck with a fictional case only she can solve.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A wealthy woman hires Mason to buy stock in her husband's land company, hoping to force his mistress out. But her plan goes awry when she is charged with murder. Now Streaming on Paramount+

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason, Della Street, and Paul Drake head to a small town to defend a young man who is charged with poisoning a blackmailer. Now Streaming on Paramount+

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: An impetuous niece who demands her trust fund be released comes to Perry Mason for help. But it's her boyfriend who needs defending when he is charged with murdering her controlling uncle. Now Streaming on Paramount+

programme.title: Descubriendo el país de nunca jamás
programme.desc: Fantasía y realidad confluyen en este éxito memorable que explora los orígenes de una de las fábulas más maravillosas de todos los tiempos: Peter Pan. Nominada a siete Premios Óscar, incluida la mejor película.

programme.title: El hombre de la máscara de hierro
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio lidera un elenco fenomenal en esta emocionante historia de majestad y mosqueteros. Cuando el arrogante rey Luis XIV de Francia comienzan a amenazar la vida de sus súbditos, ¡los legendarios mosqueteros se reúnen para salvar su país!

programme.title: Las cuatro plumas
programme.desc: Harry Feversham es un soldado con gran futuro hasta que renuncia a su regimiento. Es tachado de cobarde, repudiado por su familia, su prometida y su mejor amigo. Tras saber que su regimiento ha sido atacado, se embarca en una travesía de redención.

programme.title: Los siete sellos del apocalipsis
programme.desc: En esta película épica de desastres y fe, una madre y un padre buscan desesperadamente a su único hijo, mientras que un asteroide gigante que se dirige a la Tierra desencadena una serie de eventos apocalípticos.

programme.title: Impacto profundo
programme.desc: Cuando un par de jóvenes astrónomos descubren un cometa enorme en peligro de colisionar con la Tierra, empieza la cuenta regresiva hacia el apocalipsis y la raza humana se embarca en la lucha por la supervivencia.

programme.title: El núcleo
programme.desc: La Tierra deja de rotar por un cambio en la temperatura del centro del planeta. Para solucionarlo, los astronautas deberán viajar al centro, y detonar una bomba nuclear antes de que el centro se sobrecaliente y destruya toda la vida en la superficie.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A little girl's plaintive request for help in learning who she is leads Perry Mason into an international quest and a murder trial.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason is hired to locate a stolen photograph which has vital bearing on a sinister struggle for control of a boat building firm.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: On the eve of her wedding to a rancher, an alluring woman is slain and her body hidden in the trunk of a car. When a hired ranch hand is accused of the slaying, Perry Mason takes his defense.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A pretty secretary enlists Perry Mason's help when she finds herself framed in a blackmail plot and then accused of the death of her employer's wife.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Civil servant Ralph Duncan goes to Mason for advice after $153,000 is stolen from his car, but finds himself needing more than advice when he's found at the scene of a crime with the missing money.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The three couples that were married at first sight learn about the importance of trust in their relationships. Will their marriages flourish?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with the most explosive item to ever walk through the door--a pair of Soviet nuclear missile launch keys.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Shoeshine Mike
programme.desc: In the southern United States, roots run deep and the region's rich history is full of treasures. The team uncovers some of these amazing gems.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Some Pig
programme.desc: Shoe Shine Mike looks to sell Penelope, his champion show pig. Tammie and Jimmy check out a 1900s dentist chair, and Joker believes he has a walking stick used by Native American legend Geronimo.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: High Caliber
programme.desc: The Cajun Pawn Stars look to engineer a deal on a railroad express box from the 1800s. A customer takes a shot at selling a powerful World War II 50-caliber gun, and Jimmie tries to land photos from Apollo 13's historic splashdown.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Johnnie and Tammy attempt to strike a deal on a 1971 Fender Precision Bass guitar that will leave Jimmie speechless.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: All Jazzed Up
programme.desc: A drummer's pad with a legendary autograph fetches a fair price while three unopened Prohibition-era whiskey bottles set Jimmie reeling.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Little Bender
programme.desc: A motorized Coca-Cola mini car, a rare collection of World War II Japanese tank items and a treasured prop from "Dances With Wolves" are all on the counter.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While Mike and Frank pick the back roads of Minnesota, they challenge Danielle to sell a ten-foot fiberglass cowboy boot that's been gathering dust for over a year.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With a sprawling warehouse and overstuffed semi trailers, Kevin's New England property is a gold mine where Mike makes off with the Michelin man and then gambles on a rare collection of vintage pilot gear.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With an oversize collection of enormous steam engines, Gene's 17-acre North Carolina property is like an open-air museum where the guys start searching for smaller items they can actually move.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: At a folk art museum, Mike and Frank discover an attic and two barns that are overflowing with one-of-a-kind pieces.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: After taking a joyride on a rare 100 year old monster tractor, Mike and his brother Robbie take to a property packed with amazing steam engines and rusty relics.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys visit a hardcore collector in California who's under pressure from his County to downsize. Plus, a roadside hunch leads to a bonanza of rare vintage cars.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys uncover a once-in-a-lifetime find, and must decide to go big or go home. Mike gets down-and-dirty to rescue an old piece from Mother Nature.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Is the old man sleeping or just resting his eyes?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars meet a man hoping to sell a mysterious coin from the 1800's believed to be from George Washington's funeral.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with a supremely rare 1776 Massachusetts penny made by Revolutionary War legend Paul Revere.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars have the opportunity to own a piece of classic U.S. sports history--a hockey stick signed by the legendary 1980 Men's Olympic hockey team.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Paintball Cajun Style
programme.desc: Two new items leave the guys star struck: A check signed by Judy Garland, and a 1932 World Series program for the game in which Babe Ruth famously "called" his home run.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating the Syndicate - an International rogue organization as highly skilled as they are, committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Agent Ethan Hunt and his elite team go underground after a bombing implicates them as terrorists. While trying to clear their name, the team uncovers a plot to start a nuclear war.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating the Syndicate - an International rogue organization as highly skilled as they are, committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A new technologically-superior Soviet nuclear sub is heading for the U.S. coast; however, one CIA analyst thinks the captain will defect the submarine, and he only has hours to prove it.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Morel has been chased into an underground church by the lion-type Chimera Ant, Leol.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua have gained new allies and prepare to charge into battle.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: With only one more day remaining until the selection, Gon, Killua and Ikalgo go over their strategy.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Welfin, a wolf-like Chimera Ant, has realized that someone has infiltrated the palace. With his sharp sense of smell, he tracks down the intruders.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The battle between the humans and Chimera Ants is about to begin.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Zeno and Netero's sudden attack throws the palace into confusion. Concerned for the King's safety, Pitou and Pouf hurry to the King's side.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Youpi transforms and splits up the group with his attack. Morel lets Shoot and Knuckle handle things while he heads for the King.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Goodbye, Morioh – The Heart of Gold
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends have finally cornered Yoshikage Kira. Refusing to give up, Kira tries to activate Bites the Dust one more time to escape his desperate situation. Can Josuke and the others stop Kira in time to save the future of Morioh?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind
programme.desc: Amid the gritty beauty of Neapolis, the Joestar lineage lives on in Giorno Giovanna. After sidestepping long-term Joestar ally Koichi Hirose, Giorno must contend with two powerful Mafia gangsters, Leaky Eye Lucca and the enigmatic Bruno Bucciarati.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Eager to identify Leaky Eye Luca’s attacker, Bucciarati confronts Giorno and unleashes a Stand attack to dismantle him piece by piece. But Giorno counters with his Stand Golden Wind, surprising not just his adversary, but also himself.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Meet the Gangster Behind the Wall
programme.desc: Determined to join the mafia gang Passione, altruistic Giorno is introduced by Bucciarati to the grotesquely corpulent Polpo, an incarcerated capo who tests Giorno’s loyalty with a simple but bizarrely lethal test involving a lighter and its flame.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Plodding amid the dusky shadows of a peaceful piazza is Polpo’s macabre Stand, which assails any who dare witness the reigniting of the lighter. Giorno deciphers its method of attack, but is soon staring death in the face as Koichi comes to his aid.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Find Polpo's Fortune!
programme.desc: While word of the high-ranking capo Polpo’s alleged suicide sparks astonishment and speculation in the crime syndicate Passione, Giorno is inducted into Bucciarati’s eclectic mafia family. The only problem now is the vast fortune seemingly up for grabs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Sailing to the Isle of Capri to recover Polpo’s estate, Bucciarati and team are ambushed by a stealthy enemy Stand that deflates them into rubber-like human pelts. Abbacchio, however, thinks he can find his comrades and reluctantly activates his Stand.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having beheaded their captor by zipper, the team learns its plan has been leaked to Zucchero’s cohort, who is lying in wait on Capri. With fish and gun, Giorno and Mista swim to the island to beat the boat and weed out their assassin-in-waiting.

programme.title: God Mars
programme.desc: Gyron orders the deployment of the powerful Magnetic Cannon to destroy God Mars. Kiel, the inventor of the Magnetic Cannon, adamantly opposes its use.

programme.title: God Mars
programme.desc: Realizing God Mars will come undone, Takeru decides to attack the enemy base with the Six Robots separately.

programme.title: God Mars
programme.desc: Flore rushes to the palace to put an end to the battle against Gyron, her father. Realizing Planet Marmelo is on the brink of destruction, Gyron flees the palace while dodging Flore and Takeru's attacks.

programme.title: God Mars

programme.desc: Fernando Aguirre, Chairman and CEO of Chiquita, one of the largest producers of fruits and vegetables in the world, is unable to perform a physically demanding job at their flagship factory and has to be removed from the line.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan pierde el control de sus sentimientos entre el amor prohibido de Paula y la culpa por la enfermedad de Julieta. Emilio sigue el rastro de sus hijos. Beatriz intenta escapar con Simón, pero pone en riesgo la vida de ambos al sufrir un accidente.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta llega a la locura por el hijo de José, sus deseos por un niño la llevan a secuestrar a Simón, creyendo que es suyo. Juan le pregunta a Modesto quién es su padre biológico, Paula los interrumpe por la desaparición del hijo de José.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucía tiene leucemia. Alejandro está preocupado por la salud de su hija y Patricia lo consuela. Irene se sorprende al verlos abrazados. Verónica decide adoptar a Cecilia. Ella le jura lealtad a la señora Dantés. Gertrudis huye y Lucas la persigue.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Guerra siente que Verónica está interesada en su hijo. La desaparición de Gertrudis tiene a los Lobos preocupados. La psiquiatra cae en manos de Verónica Dantés. Ramón está muy arrepentido por la muerte del Tigre Suárez y desea contar la verdad.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los Lobos quieren saber dónde se metió Gertrudis. Verónica niega que esté en la Fortaleza, pero la tiene encerrada en el sótano de su casa. Verónica Dantés aprovecha un beso de Alejandro para cortarle un mechón de pelo para la prueba de ADN.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A provincial woman finds herself hopelessly in love with a paid escort, while Gopher sees the ghost of a man and wife still occupying a room aboard the ship.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A beautiful, fun-loving woman with a secret (Joan Fontaine) reunites with a former love (Richard Basehart) aboard the ship. Plus, an inept German detective almost turns the Pacific Princess upside down when his employer's jewels are stolen.

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha is throwing a very special BBQ called Asado; plus Martha prepares a chimichurri sauce, her daughter Alexis's chopped salad and for dessert, fruit flavored popsicles; a perfect celebration.

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Cooks

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: Martha Gardens

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: “To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth”.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.desc: Abe Lincoln's claim that he's the Great Emancipator amuses everyone except Matt Yordy.

programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.desc: Mark Twain visits North Fork and quickly alienates the townspeople.

programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.desc: Lucas becomes the target of a vengeful mountaineer after he is responsible for a young mountain boy's death.

programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The young Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork with her sick brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark falls head-over-heels in puppy love.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is escorting a prisoner to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are shocked when Lucas begins gambling. They don't know that Lucas is "undercover" trying to catch a man cheating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her, and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
